tools.name: search_hotels
tools.description:
Search and book hotels by location and dates. Returns available properties with nightly rates across major brands, boutique, and independent hotels.

Guest pays the hotel directly. Hotel's own confirmation number. Loyalty points apply.

tools.name: get_hotel_details
tools.description:
Get rates and room details for a specific hotel. Returns room types, live rates, amenities, cancellation policies, and rate_codes required by book_hotel.

Guest pays the hotel directly. Rates shown are what the hotel charges. A 1Stay Booking Fee is added at checkout. Loyalty points eligible.

Room t

tools.name: book_hotel
tools.description:
Book a hotel room. Returns a secure checkout URL where the guest completes payment. Do not collect credit card numbers, payment info, or billing details in conversation.

Guest pays the hotel directly. Their credit card statement shows the hotel name, not 1Stay. Hotel's own confirmation number. Loya

tools.name: lookup_booking
tools.description:
Look up a reservation by verifying the guest's identity. Returns the confirmation number and booking summary in conversation.

Required before calling:
1. Guest full name (first and last)
2. At least one verification factor: email address used when booking, hotel confirmation number, or last 4 digit

tools.name: resend_confirmation
tools.description:
Resend a hotel reservation confirmation email. Use after verifying the guest's identity with lookup_booking.

Sends the full confirmation to the email address on file. If the guest needs it sent to a different email (typo on original, or can't access it), provide updated_email.

tools.name: get_booking
tools.description:
Look up a reservation by booking ID (stk_bk_xxxx) or hotel confirmation number. Returns full booking details including hotel, dates, guest info, rate, and status.

Developer-level lookup tool with no identity verification. For guest-facing reservation lookups, use lookup_booking which enforces ident

tools.name: cancel_booking
tools.description:
Cancel a hotel reservation. This action cannot be undone.

Requires guest first name, last name, and hotel confirmation number.

Cancellation of non-refundable rates forfeits the full amount. The guest should be aware of the cancellation policy before this tool is called.

tools.name: search_tools
tools.description: List available 1Stay hotel booking tools. Filter by keyword: search, book, cancel, details. Omit keyword to list all tools.

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "lookup_booking" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Look up a reservation by verifying the guest's identity. Returns the confirmation number and booking summary in conversation. Required before calling: 1. Guest …

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: lookup_booking · Private data: resend_confirmation, cancel_booking · Public sink: lookup_booking, resend_confirmation · Destructive: get_hotel_details.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: lookup_booking · Private data: resend_confirmation, cancel_booking · Public sink: lookup_booking, resend_confirmation · Destructive: get_hotel_details

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
